title: Complex regional pain syndrome - NHS
text:
ort – treatments to help you cope with the emotional impact of living with CRPS, such as cognitive behavioural therapy (CBT) Because of the complex nature of CRPS, a number of different healthcare professionals will usually be involved in your care.
Find out more about treating CRPS .
